.@TSonenshine: Thank you for joining #AskState. Tweeting is gratifying. Real people matter. Stay interested. Stay involved. Stay connected.
.@TSonenshine: Information is the oxygen with which a society breathes. Stay informed. #AskState
.@TSonenshine: We need to leverage physical student exchanges and virtual online engagement -- just as we are doing now. #AskState
.@TSonenshine: By deepening expanding and leveraging our dialogue with real people, we create the conditions for policy to work. #AskState
.@TSonenshine: My meetings with #women, #LGBT activists & others relates to people to people diplomacy. More: http://t.co/Jlxv9YRH #AskState
.@TSonenshine: I also met with #LGBT activists on human rights issues, and with special needs children on education. #SmartPower #AskState
.@TSonenshine: On my recent public diplomacy trips overseas, I had a chance to work with #women dealing with gender violence. #GBC #AskState
.@TSonenshine: While in Japan, I encouraged parties to resolve differences peacefully in relationship to conflicts over islands. #AskState
.@TSonenshine: #Japan is one of our closest allies. U.S.-Japan is a critical relationship. #AskState

.@Hamurabii_AD It is also important the referendum be monitored by impartial observers, to ensure that it is fair and credible. #AskState

.@Hamurabii_AD We understand that a referendum on the draft constitution has been called for December 15. #AskState
.@Hamurabii_AD We look to the government and opposition to work through a peaceful dialogue to find greater consensus on these key issues.
